lv.heading: Biežāk uzdotie jautājumi
lv.description: Atrodiet atbildes uz populārākajiem jautājumiem par sausā ledus strūkošanu.

items.question: Ko var tīrīt ar sausā ledus strūkošanu?
items.answer: Piemērots metālam, plastmasai, gumijai un elektriskām komponentēm.

items.question: Vai tas ir droši virsmām?
items.answer: Jā, metode ir neabrazīva un nebojā pamatmateriālu.

items.question: Vai tiek izmantots ūdens vai ķīmija?
items.answer: Nē, process ir pilnībā sauss un bez ķīmijas.

items.question: Vai tas ir videi draudzīgs?
items.answer: Jā, tiek izmantots pārstrādāts CO₂ un nav sekundāro atkritumu.

items.question: Vai var tīrīt elektriskās iekārtas?
items.answer: Jā, ja process tiek veikts pareizi.

items.question: Vai paliek atlikumi?
items.answer: Nē, sausais ledus iztvaiko un neatstāj strūklošanas materiāla atlikumus.

items.question: Ar ko tas atšķiras no smilšu strūklas vai mazgāšanas?
items.answer: Nav abrazīvs un neizmanto ūdeni.

items.question: Vai nepieciešama demontāža?
items.answer: Bieži nav nepieciešama, kas samazina dīkstāvi.

items.question: Kādi ir galvenie ieguvumi?
items.answer: Mazāka dīkstāve, ātrāks process, nav atkritumu, droši iekārtām.

items.question: Vai der regulārai apkopei?
items.answer: Jā, gan padziļinātai tīrīšanai, gan regulārai apkopei.

items.question: Kādus netīrumus var noņemt?
items.answer: Eļļu, taukus, oglekļa nogulsnes, līmes un citus rūpnieciskos piesārņojumus.

en.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
en.description: Find answers to the most common questions about dry ice blasting.

items.question: What can be cleaned with dry ice blasting?
items.answer: Dry ice blasting is suitable for a wide range of surfaces including metal, plastic, rubber and electrical components.

items.question: Is it safe for surfaces?
items.answer: Yes, it is completely non-abrasive and does not damage the base material.

items.question: Does it use water or chemicals?
items.answer: No, it is fully dry and chemical-free.

items.question: Is it environmentally friendly?
items.answer: Yes, it uses recycled CO₂ and produces no secondary waste.

items.question: Can it be used on electrical equipment?
items.answer: Yes, it is safe when done correctly.

items.question: Will there be any residue?
items.answer: No, dry ice sublimates and leaves no blasting media residue.

items.question: How does it compare to sandblasting or pressure washing?
items.answer: It is non-abrasive and does not use water, making it safer for sensitive surfaces.

items.question: Is disassembly required?
items.answer: Often not, reducing downtime significantly.

items.question: What are the main benefits?
items.answer: Reduced downtime, faster cleaning, no secondary waste, safe for sensitive equipment.

items.question: Is it suitable for regular maintenance?
items.answer: Yes, both deep cleaning and regular maintenance.

items.question: What contamination can be removed?
items.answer: Oil, grease, carbon buildup, adhesives, paint and industrial residues.
